reviews.comment:
No tienen app YPF y un solo cliente por vez puede pagar con tarjeta porque solo hay un posnet. Demora enorme para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have an YPF app, and only one customer at a time can pay by card because there's only one POS terminal. There are huge waits to get fuel.

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para parar en el camino a cargar nafta. Un oasis para pedir un café y tomarlo bajo los arboles del camping, combustible de calidad y la mejor atención de los catamarqueños

(Translated by Google)
A lovely place to stop on the way to fill up with gas. An oasis to order a coffee and enjoy it under the trees of the campground, quality fuel, and the best service from the people of Catamarca.
